title: Intensely Rich Italian Gorgonzola Pasta
description: A fresh and shattering lazy-sunday polish dish featuring gorgonzola-dolce and miso-marinate, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly recipe is perfect for a relaxing afternoon meal.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a small bowl, whisk together the miso paste and 2 tbsp of hot water until smooth.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the crumbled gorgonzola dolce to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until the cheese is melted and smooth.
Stir the miso paste mixture into the gorgonzola cheese and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until well combined.
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to coat with the gorgonzola sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste, then sprinkle with chopped parsley and grated parmesan cheese if desired.
